gap_closure_ledger.detail: Matched to executable filterflow simple_linear_comparison settings: transition covariance I_2, observation covariance 0.1 I_2, T=150, N=25, theta grid 0.25/0.5/0.75, RegularisedTransform scaling=0.9 and convergence_threshold=1e-3. Earlier audit recorded a paper/code covariance ambiguity, so exact paper-table reproduction is not claimed here.
This gap closure reruns LGSSM likelihood behavior only; gradient/smoothness replication remains separate.
